text_anchors: The top header keeps disappearing behind the board when I scroll down.
The header stacking order is too low; it renders below the main content area instead of staying on top.
I can't see the search bar or controls because they get covered by the kanban board when scrolling.
positive_node: <header className="board-header bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 sticky top-0 z-0">

text_anchors: The activity sidebar is getting hidden behind other stuff on mobile.
The sidebar's layering order causes it to render under the board; it should be in front.
I cannot access the activity feed on my phone because it's blocked by the main content.
positive_node: <aside className="activity-sidebar w-12 bg-white border-l border-gray-200 flex flex-col h-full flex-shrink-0 absolute right-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-0 md:relative shadow-xl md:shadow-none">

text_anchors: All the columns are stacked on top of each other instead of side by side.
The columns are using vertical stacking instead of horizontal layout; they should be in a row.
I have to scroll down repeatedly to see each task column, making it impossible to compare tasks across boards.
The task info at the bottom is all smooshed together.
The footer elements are aligned to the left instead of being distributed between left and right sides.
The assignee avatars are stuck next to the comments count, making the card look cluttered and hard to read.
positive_node: <div className="flex items-center mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-50">

text_anchors: The user profile pictures are bleeding off the edge of the card.
The assignee stack has excessive negative margin causing overflow beyond the card boundary.
I can't see the profile images clearly as they're cut off or partially hidden outside the task card.
The task titles are getting cut off and are too small.
The task title has forced single-line text truncation with a narrow maximum width, cutting off content.
I cannot read the full task names because they're truncated to just a few characters.
positive_node: <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 leading-snug group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap max-w-28">

text_anchors: The task cards are overlapping with huge gaps between them.
The vertical spacing between cards is excessively large, causing overlapping elements and layout issues.
The cards are stacking awkwardly with too much space, making some cards invisible or overlapped.
positive_node: <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100/50 rounded-xl p-2 border border-gray-100/50 flex flex-col gap-9 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">

text_anchors: The search box is way too tiny; I can hardly see it.
The search input has an extremely narrow width constraint, making the placeholder text and input area barely visible.
I cannot see or use the search field effectively because it's shrunk to an unusable size.
positive_node: <input type="text" placeholder="Search tasks..." className="pl-9 pr-4 py-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 w-16 transition-all" />

text_anchors: The sidebar on the right is just a tiny sliver; nothing fits.
The sidebar width is severely constrained to a minimal value, causing all content to be hidden or crushed.
The activity feed sidebar is unusable because it's too narrow to display any text or information.
positive_node: <aside className="activity-sidebar w-12 bg-white border-l border-gray-200 flex flex-col h-full flex-shrink-0 absolute right-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-0 md:relative shadow-xl md:shadow-none">

text_anchors: The overlay that should dim the background when the sidebar opens isn't showing up.
The mobile overlay backdrop is completely transparent instead of semi-transparent, making it invisible.
I can't tell if the sidebar modal is actually open because there's no visual feedback or dimming of the background.
positive_node: setIsSidebarOpen(false)}>
